task_completion.description: Create a simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter in OpenICE
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE application GUI should be visible, showing a 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter running, connected, or selected in the interface.

task_completion.description: Create the monitor_sample.csv file with the correct header
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'monitor_sample.csv' is open in a text editor or spreadsheet viewer, and the first row contains exactly the header 'Time,HeartRate,SpO2'.

task_completion.description: Record at least 5 samples of Heart Rate and SpO2 data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'monitor_sample.csv' file contains at least 5 rows of data below the header. The values should be within physiological ranges (Heart Rate: 40-160, SpO2: 80-100).
A file named 'sample_analysis.txt' is visible on the Desktop or open in a text editor.

task_completion.description: Write a summary report containing Mean Heart Rate, SpO2 Range, and stability assessment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'sample_analysis.txt' file contains text explicitly stating the calculated 'Mean Heart Rate', the 'SpO2 Range' (minimum and maximum values), and a qualitative assessment of the patient's stability.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenICE GUI to observe data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenICE graphical interface with live physiological waveforms or numerical displays at some point during the trajectory, proving the agent didn't just fabricate the data.

integrity.description: The agent performed manual data collection rather than purely scripted fabrication
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen switching between the OpenICE application and a text editor/spreadsheet to manually record the samples over time.

integrity.description: The analysis report accurately reflects the collected CSV data
integrity.visual_evidence: The Mean Heart Rate and SpO2 Range (min-max) written in 'sample_analysis.txt' must mathematically match the raw data values visible in 'monitor_sample.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected CSV path: /home/ga/Desktop/monitor_sample.csv. Expected Report path: /home/ga/Desktop/sample_analysis.txt. The CSV must have the exact header 'Time,HeartRate,SpO2' and contain at least 5 data rows (6 rows total including header). Valid physiological ranges for the synthetic OpenICE data are Heart Rate: 40-160 bpm, SpO2: 80-100%. The analysis report must include Mean Heart Rate, SpO2 Range (min-max), and a stability assessment based on the collected data.
